hero.headline: Yi hasashe. Sa gaske. Samu.
hero.subheading: Kasuwannin hasashe na rarrabawa akan Stellar. Da sauri, mai arha, kuma mai bayyana.

bettingSlip.title: Takarda ta Caca
bettingSlip.noBets: Babu cace-cace da suke jira. Ƙara cace-cace daga kowane kasuwa don haɗa su tare.
bettingSlip.connectWalletPrompt: Haɗa wallet ɗinku don ƙaddamar da cace-cace

notifications.title: Sanarwar Push
notifications.description: Karɓi faɗakarwa don kasuwannin da kuka caca (An ba da shawarar/An warware).
notifications.connectWalletFirst: Da fatan za a haɗa wallet ɗinku da farko.

insufficientGas.title: Gas ba ya Isawa
insufficientGas.message: Ba ku da isassun XLM don rufe kuɗin gas na ma'amala. Hanyar sadarwar Stellar tana buƙatar ƙaramin XLM don kowane aikin.

transactionFailed.title: Ma'amala Ta Kasa
transactionFailed.message: Ledger ya ƙi wannan ma'amala. Wannan na iya kasancewa saboda slippage, cunkoson hanyar sadarwa, ko ƙarewar wa'adin.

walletDisconnected.title: An yanke Wallet
walletDisconnected.message: An yanke haɗin ku zuwa hanyar sadarwar Stellar. Da fatan za a sake haɗa wallet ɗinku don ci gaba da hasashe.

marketPaused.title: An Tsayar da Kasuwa
marketPaused.message: An kunna karɓen wannan kasuwa. Ciniki an dakatar da shi na ɗan lokaci yayin da injiniyoyinmu ke sake daidaita ma'auni.

market.linkCopied: An kwafi hanyar haɗin kasuwa zuwa clipboard!
market.queueFull: Takarda ta caca cike take (tafi {{max}} cace-cace). Cire ɗaya don ƙara ƙari.
